Name: Kearny-Fuchida
Details: In 2018 two professors, Thomas Kearny and Takayoshi Fuchida, published a research paper theorizing the ability to warp space to allow for instantaneous space travel. Originally dismissed by the scientific community, their theories would eventually lead to the Deimos Project, when the TAS Pathfinder made the first interstellar jump from the Sol to the Tau Ceti star system, using a Kearny-Fuchida drive.
